paragraphs.text: Thirty-seven issues of Folio Obscura, indexed by season and stratified by the hidden logic of the moment in which each volume was set, printed, and bound.
Volumes 01–04 (1996–1998) were hand-bound in editions of 600 and remain partially unscanned. Microfilm copies held at Basel.
A quarterly periodical of design criticism, set in Georgia & system grotesks, printed in editions of 2,400 on uncoated parchment stock.
